title: sideritis spinulosa var. hirsuta
intro: Sideritis spinulosa var. hirsuta is a sub-species of the Sideritis genus, commonly known as mountain tea or ironwort. This plant, native to the Mediterranean region, has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis spinulosa var. hirsuta include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Sideritis spinulosa var. hirsuta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
